name: StarTrack
description: Community star ratings for movies and TV shows — stored privately on your Jellyfin server.
overview: StarTrack adds a compact star rating pill to every Movie and TV Series detail page in your Jellyfin library. Click it to expand a full panel where you can submit your 1-5 star rating and see a breakdown of every individual user's score. All data lives in a JSON file on your server — nothing leaves your network.

versions.changelog: Initial release — star ratings for Movies and TV Shows, community average display, expandable per-user score list, and remove-rating support.
